document_summary: Introduction page for Marketing Research journal, a trade and economic periodical founded in 1953, sponsored by the Statistical Information Consulting Center of Henan Province, with ISSN 1672-4216. This establishes the credibility of the publication venue.

snippets.text: Marketing Research magazine was founded in 1953 and is sponsored by the Statistical Information Consulting Center of Henan Province. It focuses on market research and information and is openly distributed in China and abroad. It is a periodical in the category of trade and economy. the domestic issue number is 41- 1348/C, and ISSN is 1672. 4216. Marketing Research is a monthly periodical. The purpose of the periodical is to promote developments in market research and information. Contributions from trade and economic units and related authors are welcome.
